TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_South_sudan, title = South_sudan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/South_sudan} }

S.FORM: South sudan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 644,329 sq km (maki' tay 42ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga ) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 12,530,717. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Juba. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Salva Kiir Mayardit, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

South sudan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 644,329 sq km (maki' tay 42ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga ) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 12,530,717. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Juba. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Salva Kiir Mayardit, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēoutńß s~…ēu*an ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *uő≤a. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēal*a kiir majar*it, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
